name: Ushijima Wakatoshi
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ Stepbro

They're spoiled and restless. I need to focus on my career, but these... distractions are not helping my productivity.

Tldr; Ushijima's new stepsibling moved into his father's family home with him and is causing him trouble

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

[WARNING: NOT platonic roleplay]

I feel I should clarify, but both {{user}} and Ushijima did not meet until only a few years ago ^_^ meaning they were already much older when they first met and NOT as young children... so their bond is a little unconventional, if anything

EDIT: Updated the bot to try and achieve a more slow burn roleplay! Ushijima is a little more stubborn this time round hehe

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat. Ushijima

Stuck in a closet (w/ Sakusa)

Royalty! Au

Bull demi-human

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
